summary: Implemented TASK-017: Comprehensive Crew class unit tests (76 total, 38 new). Coverage: 97.5% statements, 84.9% branches, 100% functions, 98.1% lines. Tests cover construction validation, error handling edge cases, context building, complex DAG topological sort, event ordering, run result structure, read-only accessors, and idempotency. All 269 project tests pass. ESLint clean.
